CreateNetworkDetection.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateNetworkDetection.name: Network detection name, up to 65 characters, consisting of digits, letters, and underscores.
CreateNetworkDetection.description: Network detection description, up to 200 characters.
CreateNetworkDetection.vpcId: ID of the VPC to which the network detection belongs.
CreateNetworkDetection.subnetId: ID of the subnet to which the network detection belongs.
CreateNetworkDetection.protocol: Detection protocol type. Supported values: ICMP, TCP, UDP, DNS.
CreateNetworkDetection.sourceIps: List of source IPs for detection. Can be empty; if so, sourceIpNum must be specified.
CreateNetworkDetection.sourceIpNum: Number of source IPs to be automatically assigned for detection.
CreateNetworkDetection.destPort: Destination port for detection. Required for TCP, UDP, and DNS types.
CreateNetworkDetection.payload: Probe string for UDP type or probe domain name for DNS type.
